positive: A stylized illustration of a whimsical celestial journey. A lone, silhouetted astronaut in a bubble helmet floats past a ringed Saturn-like planet and a cluster of glowing, bioluminescent nebula clouds. The scene is highly stylized with clean lines and deep contrasts. Foreground elements include stylized crescent moons and clusters of abstract, geometric stars. Color palette is deep indigo, cosmic teal, electric violet, and brilliant gold accents. Composition is perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for chest placement on apparel. Style is retro-futurism meets Art Deco poster art. Studio lighting, high contrast, vector-like sharpness, isolated subject.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, logos, signature, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, low resolution, sketch, oil painting, photorealistic, noise
